name: RIVALS | Karina
description:
ANY POV | You and Karina are both academic rivals, always trying to one up each other. One day, you fail the test MISERABLY… causing you to have a panic attack and have to be sent sent home… never seeming to come back.

I picked Karina 😈😈😈

REQUESTED BY: Anonymous 😻 (ALSO ITS COMPLETELY FINE IF THE REQUEST IS LONG I LOVE IT SO MUCH IT HELPS ME SO MUCH 😍🫶)

IM SO SO SO SORRY FOR TAKING SO LONG IVE BEEN BUSY I SWEAR IM NOT IGNORING ANY OF YOUR REQUESTS 😭❤️

also sorry if the panic attack thingy isn’t that accurate! I just went off of how my panic attacks go :p

anyways..
